cases.title: Nebula Finance Dashboard
cases.cardDescription: AI-powered analytics dashboard for crypto portfolio teams.
cases.projectSummary: Nebula is a finance analytics workspace for tracking treasury performance, portfolio risk, and token allocation scenarios in one place.
cases.problem: Analysts were juggling multiple spreadsheets and tools, causing delays in reporting and poor visibility for leadership.
results: +32% faster weekly reporting cycle
-41% time spent on manual data prep
Adoption reached 78% across internal teams in 6 weeks
Stakeholder confidence improved with real-time metrics
cases.introBody: We interviewed analysts and PMs to map their reporting routines, then identified key pain points in data consolidation and stakeholder handoff.
cases.middleBody: We prioritized fast drill-downs, persistent filters, and reusable report templates to reduce repetitive tasks.
cases.finalBody: The final experience delivered clearer KPI storytelling and reduced reporting friction across the organization.

cases.title: Atlas Travel Planner
cases.cardDescription: Collaborative itinerary builder for modern travel teams.
cases.projectSummary: Atlas helps travelers coordinate routes, bookings, and shared plans with friends and family in one lightweight interface.
cases.problem: Users struggled to merge links, maps, and bookings across chats, resulting in duplicated effort and missed reservations.
results: Trip planning time reduced by 37%
+24% increase in completed shared itineraries
Support tickets about booking confusion dropped by 29%
Higher NPS in post-trip surveys
cases.introBody: Through diary studies, we found that trust and clarity in shared edits were the biggest blockers for group planning.
cases.middleBody: We introduced timeline-based editing, location clusters, and visual conflict warnings for overlapping plans.
cases.finalBody: Atlas shipped with a clearer planning flow and better collaboration cues, making group trips less chaotic.

cases.title: Юля Самая лучшая
cases.projectSummary: Streamline CRM was an outdated sales platform with a cluttered UI and inconsistent workflows. I led a full redesign to modernize the experience and improve usability for everyday tasks.
cases.problem: Users struggled with confusing navigation, inconsistent layouts, and too many steps to complete simple actions—hurting adoption and productivity.
results: 40% increase in active weekly users within 3 months
Reduction in average task time by 35% for key workflows
Consistent 4.7/5 user satisfaction score in post-launch feedback
Internal teams reported fewer support requests and improved onboarding for new hires
cases.introBody: Early user interviews and session recordings made one thing clear: the product was getting in the way of the process.
cases.middleBody: I began by mapping the most frequent workflows and identifying friction points at each step.
cases.finalBody: The redesign focused on removing friction, simplifying workflows, and improving clarity across the product.

cases.title: Pulse Health Companion
cases.cardDescription: Personal health tracking experience focused on habits and motivation.
cases.projectSummary: Pulse combines wearable metrics with guided routines to help users build sustainable daily habits.
cases.problem: Most health apps overloaded users with numbers but failed to provide actionable next steps.
results: +19% week-4 retention
+27% increase in daily check-ins
Improved completion rate of guided routines
Higher confidence scores in user interviews
cases.introBody: We mapped drop-off points and discovered users needed simpler progress framing and smaller wins.
cases.middleBody: The product introduced progressive goals, adaptive reminders, and clearer daily summaries.
cases.finalBody: Pulse shifted from data-heavy reporting to behavior-first guidance, improving engagement over time.

cases.title: Vertex AI Studio
cases.cardDescription: Prompt testing and workflow automation tool for ops teams.
cases.projectSummary: Vertex enables non-technical teams to prototype AI workflows, compare prompts, and monitor output quality.
cases.problem: Operations teams lacked visibility into prompt quality and had no clear way to compare model outputs at scale.
results: Prompt iteration cycles became 2.1x faster
Error rate in production automations dropped by 23%
Cross-team collaboration improved through shared experiments
Faster onboarding for new team members
cases.introBody: We mapped existing manual QA flows and identified missing trust signals in model output review.
cases.middleBody: We focused on explainability, side-by-side comparisons, and confidence indicators for every run.
cases.finalBody: Vertex reduced experimentation friction and gave operations teams stronger control over AI quality.
